subject: Re: Gator 4X6 for Helicopter
body:
yes definitely

--- LVJET@aol.com wrote:

> Jeffrey,
> I would like to use Miles oldest Gator 4X6 at the
> St. Thomas  airport to move 
> our Bell 407. I shipped the helicopter dolly that we
> land on to  move 
> helicopter since I have found hanger space to store
> Bell  407.
> I would replace Miles Gator with a new unit,  I 
> would take his oldest 
> machine.
> Is this OK?
>  
> *** I have received Border Overflight for Bedford as
> you  know.
> I am pleased to report that I included Albuquerque,
> NM and was  approved!
>  
>  
>  
>

body_html:
yes definitely

--- LVJET@aol.com wrote:

Jeffrey,
I would like to use Miles oldest Gator 4X6 at the
St. Thomas airport to move
our Bell 407. I shipped the helicopter dolly that we
land on to move
helicopter since I have found hanger space to store
Bell 407.
I would replace Miles Gator with a new unit, I
would take his oldest
machine.
Is this OK?

*** I have received Border Overflight for Bedford as
you know.
I am pleased to report that I included Albuquerque,
NM and was approved!
